channel.title: plotly on Shubham
channel.description: Recent content in plotly on Shubham

item.title: An approach to forecast impact of Covid-19 using supervised machine learning model
item.description: The current focus on the analysis of environmental data for the prediction of future trends has made it a prime area of research worldwide. Based on the kind of data prediction and analytical techniques employed, the present as well as the future state of the data can be forecasted or predicted. The novelty of the work proposed and outlined in this article is that it considers an approach that combines nonlinear transmission and social-spatial and temporal transmission along with the monthwise prediction of future data.

item.title: 911 Calls Analysis
item.description: In this project, I analyzed and visualized 911 calls data from Montgomery County, Pennsylvania. Dataset Used: Kaggel 911 Calls Dataset (https://www.kaggle.com/mchirico/montcoalert) I visualized and analyzed this data using different well-known libraries in python, such as pandas, numpy, seaborn, plotly, matplotlib. I used folium for visualizsing the coordinates latitude and longitude on a map. I tried to look into various factors and reasons for all the 911 calls and tried to find correlations between different factors.

item.title: Covid-19 Future Forecasting
item.description: In this project, which was later adapted as part of a research paper, I followed these steps: Data Collection and Preprocessing: I collected data from the following sources: “Ministry of Health and Family Welfare India” website (https://www.mohfw.gov.in/) “World Health Organization (WHO) website (https://covid19.who.int/table) “Our World In Data” website (https://ourworldindata.org/coronavirus) “Kaggle” website (https://www.kaggle.com/) I performed data cleaning and preprocessing as a lot of data was missing in all the datasets.
